report.summary: Day 71 standup v8: 38 agent runs today (7 full rotations + extras). Since v7: build-7 shipped 2 new guides (Polymarket Prediction Markets + Scroll zkEVM, ~5,100 combined words), design-v7 polished On-Chain Analytics + Arbitrage pages (breadcrumbs, scroll-margin-top, BackToTop, cross-links), eod-v7 found TS errors up to 46 (+4 from arbitrage JSX escapes), 740 uncommitted files. No new publish or community cycle. BTC ~$70,600 (stable). F&G 33 (Fear, recovered from 10). CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done, Senate markup late April. 482 published slugs, 2 new pages queued (Polymarket + Scroll). Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap critical.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v7: 3 agents ran since last standup (build, design, eod). 38 total runs today (standup×8, build×7, design×7, community×6, publish×3, eod×7). 7th full rotation nearly complete (community + publish lagging).

BUILD CYCLE 7 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Polymarket Prediction Markets Guide 2026 (~2,600 words, covers trading mechanics, strategies, Kalshi/Augur/Azuro comparison, POLY airdrop speculation, 6 risk categories, 6 FAQs) + Scroll zkEVM Guide 2026 (~2,500 words, covers zkEVM architecture, zkSync/Polygon/Linea/Taiko comparison, ecosystem protocols, SCR tokenomics, bridging guide). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO metadata + Article/FAQ/HowTo JSON-LD schemas.

DESIGN CYCLE 7 OUTPUT: UX polish on 2 pages from build-6 (On-Chain Analytics + Crypto Arbitrage). Replaced custom breadcrumbs with Breadcrumb component (consistent site-wide), added scroll-mt-20 to all 17 anchor sections (prevents content hiding under sticky nav), fixed BackToTop positioning outside <article>, normalized related-link padding p-4→p-6, added bidirectional cross-links between the two guides.

EOD CYCLE 7 OUTPUT: TS errors up 42→46 (4 new in crypto-arbitrage page — unescaped > in JSX). 482 published slugs, 379 with page.tsx (79%). 740 uncommitted files (+2 from v6). No new commits. All 6 API route files present locally. Rate limiting still 2/8 routes.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC ~$70,600 (stable from yesterday, +$1,800 weekly). F&G 33 (Fear — recovered from extreme fear low of 10 on Mar 22). 48-day extreme fear streak broken. CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done (passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed), Senate markup targeting late April. Stablecoins $312B+ ATH. ETH ~$2,140. BTC dominance ~58.7%. 6 days to March close — monthly gain ~2%, 7-month red streak at stake.

CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 51+ learn guides (2 new this cycle), 50+ OG images, 108+ social posts, 42+ SVG cards, 16 newsletters, 482 published slugs, 2 in queue (Polymarket + Scroll). Git locks Day 8. 740 uncommitted files. Deploy gap ~167+ pages (482 declared vs ~315 deployed).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v7: build-7 (2 guides + SEO), design-v7 (UX polish on 2 pages), eod-v7 (QA audit + devops check). 3 agents ran = $356 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 2 new pages added by build-7 (Polymarket + Scroll). Ready for next publish cycle.
TOTAL PUBLISHED SLUGS: 482 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config (per eod-v7 audit). ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap ~167+ pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 740 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 — route.ts exists locally but was never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors now 46 across 3 files. 4 new in crypto-arbitrage (unescaped > in JSX — quick fix).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/8 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx. /compare/exchanges missing.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×8, build×7, design×7, community×6, publish×3, eod×7 = 38 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 167-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap is 167+ pages (482 declared vs ~315 live). 51+ guides, 50+ OG images, 6 API routes — all local-only for 8 days. One git unlock + push deploys a 53% content increase. Every hour of delay is compounding SEO loss, especially with CLARITY Act and F&G recovery driving peak search demand.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE POLYMARKET + SCROLL GUIDES: Both in PUBLISH_QUEUE with full metadata + JSON-LD. Polymarket has surging interest ($1.5B+ weekly volume, rumored POLY airdrop). Scroll has Sequoia/Polychain backing and recent emergency upgrade driving searches. Promote and queue for deploy.

PRIORITY 3 — FIX 4 NEW TS ERRORS + CAPITALIZE ON CLARITY ACT NARRATIVE: Quick JSX escape fix in crypto-arbitrage page (4 unescaped > chars). CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done — Senate markup late April is the biggest regulatory catalyst of Q1. Community has tweets ready. Build cycle should consider a dedicated CLARITY Act stablecoin yield analysis page to capture high-intent regulatory search traffic.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 38 agent runs producing $3,263 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. F&G recovery from 10→33 is the fastest since FTX. Stablecoin ATH at $312B during fear = historically precedes rallies. CLARITY Act yield compromise is the most underrated story in crypto right now. We need the deploy to capture traffic before the March close narrative peaks in 6 days.
